title: King and Queen Fall Back
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Straw Hat Pirates, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Zoro as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a dead end, there is nowhere to go!

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: You're one of the straw hats....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought there might be a few stragglers... get moving, quick!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: pant... pant... how is the fire spreading this fast?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this rate, countless are going to burn to death...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Dying in Battle would be less cruel!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We can't get caught in the crossfire!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm back to normal!! Those side effects made me withered and weak for a while.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm more worried about zero, myagi!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's right, the Remedy he took...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that super recovery also has a great cost, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All the damage he suffered will come back many times worse!! I hope he's won his fight already...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Before, his injuries were so bad he couldn't move!! If those wounds got multiple times worse...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Zoro... Please don't die on us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Zoro, you bastard! Where'd you go?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 45 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
